title: Dynamic World Border
description: Dynamic World Border is a Minecraft plugin that dynamically manages your world border, automatically expanding or shrinking it over time according to your configuration.
body:
# DynamicWorldBorder

DynamicWorldBorder is a Minecraft plugin that dynamically manages your world border, automatically expanding or shrinking it over time according to your configuration.

## Features
-Automatic world border expansion or shrinking at configurable intervals.
-Saves the border size on server shutdown and restores it on startup (optional reset).
-Pre-generates chunks in new border areas to reduce lag.
-Simple commands to toggle border expansion on or off.
-Permission-based access control.

## Commands
/dynamicworldborder <on|off|reload> or /dwb <on|off|reload>

Enables or disables the automatic border expansion. Reloads the plugin.

## Permissions
**worldborder.toggle** — Allows toggling border expansion (default: operator only).

**worldborder.admin** — Full access to all commands (default: none).

### Installation
1. Place the DynamicWorldBorder.jar file into your server’s plugins folder.
2. Start the server to generate the configuration file.
3. Modify config.yml to your preferences.
4. Restart the server or reload the plugin.
5. Use /dynamicworldborder on/off to manage the expanding border.
